shows.title: Musical Improv Jam
shows.excerpt: A free musical improv jam. Musical improv is improv with the added conventions of musical theatre, meaning that your improvised scenes turn to songs, and you make up all the sung lyrics and choreography along with the scene. Whether you've…
shows.description: A free musical improv jam. Musical improv is improv with the added conventions of musical theatre, meaning that your improvised scenes turn to songs, and you make up all the sung lyrics and choreography along with the scene. Whether you’ve never tried musical improv before, are a student studying musical improv, or are an established improviser who wants to try something new, this jam is a low-pressure FREE opportunity to do musical improv, joined by veterans of the form. Please note, this is a jam, NOT a class, meaning we won’t be teaching the conventions of the form, we’ll just be playing sets! You are totally welcome to jump in regardless, but if that feels scary, Musical Improv 101 is a great place to start learning about this form! Hosted by: Ryan Brookshire, Tara Copeland, Philip Labes, Greg Smith, Ashley Ward and Andrew Young No reservations needed – just show up and jam! — Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.description: UCB comedy powerhouse, The Prophecy, does an hour of improv based on your futures. Come watch the long-running, critically-acclaimed UCB improv team, The Prophecy, do an hour of improv based on your futures. Will the trip be a disaster? Will the crush say yes? Will Liz from the office ever stop heating up salmon in the microwave for lunch? Featuring NYC’s most talented actors and comedians, The Prophecy creates a hilarious, theatrical experience that the audience and the performers will never see again. We’ve consulted the cards, the leaves, the stars- everything. You don’t wanna miss this. Featuring: Shane Nielsen, Beth Slack, Brandon Dzirko, Nikita Burdein, Donald Chang, Curran Connor, and Risa Harms —- In-person tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.description: The world’s most popular completely improvised full band musical! Baby Wants Candy is a critically acclaimed comedy ensemble with casts in Chicago, LA, NY and an international touring company. The audience shouts out a title of a musical that has never been performed before. Accompanied by a full band, the first title the group hears becomes the title and theme for that evening’s completely improvised musical. shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.title: Improvised Jane Austen
shows.excerpt: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal me...
shows.description: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal measure with an improvised rom-com for everyone, whether you love Austen or just like to laugh! Improvised Jane Austen currently performs Saturday nights at 6:00 pm at iO Theater and tickets are $20. "...[They] took it, owned it and created some really funny and touching moments....an evening of silliness and indulgence....make running amok look like delicious fun." -- PerformInk Chicago Join Improvised Jane Austen for the signature romantic comedy and social satire of the beloved author, improvised by Chicago's top comedic talent. Celebrate all things love, friendship, and Austen this Summer. “...Improvised Jane Austen is one of the strongest improv troupes in the city. They have the ability to use Austen’s 19th century wit and sarcasm and make it recognizable for a 21st-century audience." --Scapi Magazine Improvised Jane Austen is a comedic ensemble that creates unscripted performances using Jane Austen's tropes, themes, and language to create a satirical romantic comedy set in Regency-era England. Playing in Austen’s world, Improvised Jane Austen’s stories delight 21st century audiences with a modern sense and sensibility. The current cast of 20+ performers rotate weekly, creating a new ensemble for every show. Come for the humor, stay for the heart! Throughout the show’s run, Improvised Jane Austen has been Chicago Reader Recommended , named a PerformInk Critics’ Pick , voted Best sketch/improv troupe 2019 in the Reader’s Best of Chicago , and was featured on WTTW playlist , in Time Out , the Chicago Tribune and on a their list of what to do on Valentine’s Day , on WGN’s Daytime Chicago in 2024 and 2026 and on CBS News Chicago . Learn more: https://improvisedjaneausten.com/

shows.title: Duchovny
shows.excerpt: NYC’s funniest improv show brought to you by a group of top-tier psychopaths. Have you ever had an encounter with a ghost? An alien? A kid you were babysitting who is maybe just spoiled BUT PERHAPS WAS ACTUALLY POSSESSED?! Each…
shows.description: NYC’s funniest improv show brought to you by a group of top-tier psychopaths. Have you ever had an encounter with a ghost? An alien? A kid you were babysitting who is maybe just spoiled BUT PERHAPS WAS ACTUALLY POSSESSED?! Each show, we let real audience encounters with the unexplained inspire a completely improvised fever dream, the likes of which has never been seen before, will never be seen again, and perhaps… shouldn’t be seen again because some of that stuff was deeply unwell. I mean don’t get me wrong, it was funny, but I really hope they’re in therapy. This group of elite New York maniacs is composed of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you’ve probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before YouTube videos. Their collective credits include Girls, Russian Doll, The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel, What We Do in the Shadows, The Other Two, Dickinson, and getting paid to dress up as a slice of pizza at the New York Stock Exchange. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Danny Forster Sat Jul 11th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie Rivera Amie Roe Matthew Shafeek Elena Skopetos Billy Soco Steve Whyte

It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Meltdown: Ghost Girl & Milwaukee
shows.description: Two powerhouse sketch teams. One uproarious hour. Endless laughs! 👻 Ghost Girl has been delivering surreal, twisted, and wildly imaginative comedy since 2022. Operating on the logic of your favorite Saturday morning cartoons, they dive into everything from therapy and tech to—you guessed it—magic cats. 🍺 Milwaukee!, a beloved New York City staple, is witty, silly, and just a teensy bit frisky. They’ve been making audiences laugh across the country with their playful, unpredictable sketches since 2018. Together, Ghost Girl and Milwaukee! have taken stages by storm at SF Sketchfest, Austin Sketchfest, Montreal Sketchfest, The Chicago Sketch Comedy Festival, The Portland Sketch Comedy Festival, Philly Sketchfest, and more. You've seen these performers on Saturday Night Live, 30 Rock, Inside Amy Schumer, and popping up in commercials everywhere. Their writing has appeared in The New Yorker, McSweeney’s, Sports Illustrated, Reductress, and The Onion. Follow them on Instagram: @ghostgirlsketchcomedy & @milwaukeesketchcomedy. Directed by: Dennis Pacheco (Ghost Girl) and Shem Pennant (Milwaukee!) Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets Meltdown: Ghost Girl & Milwaukee Sat Jul 11th, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket

shows.description: Sketch Reassignment Surgery is an all-trans sketch troupe featuring some of Chicago's most visible trans comedians. Our mission is simple: to make a sketch comedy transition. By exploring themes like gender as simulacrum, the feminine grotesque, and queer deconstructionism — we’re slicing open the body of traditional sketch comedy and reconstructing it in our own image. She’s ready. Are you?

shows.title: Spank: Ripstickin’ & Burpin’
shows.excerpt: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It's a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will…
shows.description: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It’s a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will be good, some will be bad but it will all be weird and new and that’s what makes it fun! It’s experimental sketch at its finest! Come on, you know you need a spanking. This Monday, we have… Ripstickin’ & Burpin’: Following successful runs at The Second City in Chicago, and UCB and Brooklyn Comedy Collective in New York, check out the LA premiere of Ripstickin’ & Burpin’!!!! When confronted with a cancer diagnosis, Jake Griffith found himself looking back for any semblance of meaning in his short short life; from intense oversharing while making out, to a cancer cover of “Trap Queen” by Fetty Wap, to religious girlfriends leaving him for Jesus, or simply the joy of ripstickin’ & burpin’. This show explores how Jake’s perspective blossomed and changed when it was almost taken away. Woven through stories and meditations on the absurdity of modern life, Jake plays us a deep cut 1975 song possibly way too many times, and poses the question: “Does the three minutes silence in the song ‘You’ off the deluxe album of The 1975 actually mean anything or has Jake been sitting there in silence for nothing?” Written & performed by Jake Griffith — All sales are final. shows.title: QT’s Presents… JOY!
shows.excerpt: Your favorite trans/gnc/non binary improvisers perform a set inspired by your tales of joy! We are UCB’s first all trans/gender nonconforming/non binary improv team, and what better way to celebrate than doing some improv based on your most joyful memories?!…
shows.description: Your favorite trans/gnc/non binary improvisers perform a set inspired by your tales of joy! We are UCB’s first all trans/gender nonconforming/non binary improv team, and what better way to celebrate than doing some improv based on your most joyful memories?! Trans and gender nonconforming people have had a rough few years… For many in our community, this is a time of anxiety, fear, and fury. It’s now more important than ever to create spaces of pure, unadulterated queer fun where we can rest, relax, and recharge. Come spend an hour laughing with us as we all try to pretend the outside world doesn’t exist! Allies are of course welcome. shows.title: Living Room Living Room
shows.excerpt: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week featu...
shows.description: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week features a rotating cast of WGIS’s top performers—plus surprise guests from TV, film, and the national improv scene. Main Cast: Will Hines ( Broad City, Comedy Bang Bang, Brooklyn 99 ) Sarah Claspell ( Brooklyn 99, Jimmy Kimmel Live, Drunk History ) Jim Woods ( The Office, How I Met Your Mother, Reno 911 ) Beth Appel ( Sex Lives of College Girls, Never Have I Ever ) Dave Theune ( St. Denis Medical, Frasier ) Jamie Gaul ( General Hospital, Grey’s Anatomy, Medium ) Surprise guests every week. Past guests include: Colton Dunn ( Superstore, Key & Peele ) Zeke Nicholson ( Dropout TV, The Good Place, A.P. Bio ) Connor Ratliff ( Mean Girls, The George Lucas Talk Show ) + more!! Cast for Sunday May 3 Beth Appel Hazel Brady Russel Carter Sarah Claspell Rachel Clayton May Darmon Will Hines Mike McLendon Dave Theune Jim Woods

shows.title: Harold Night
shows.excerpt: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house t...
shows.description: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house teams will showcase the wonderful, strange, and thrilling art of improv, making you second-guess if what you're seeing is truly made up on-the-spot. Two teams will perform their individual sets and then end the show with The Dream, performing a near accurate depiction of an audience member's dreams! Featuring rotating performances from: Baby Grand BL!MP Morning Glory Chariot Mischief Feast The Wretched Fever Dream

shows.title: Love Island Finale Patio Watch Party
shows.excerpt: Put on your favorite island outfit, and get ready for an evening of romance, drama, and surprises. Superfan Imani Neal is hosting the ultimate Love Island Finale Watch Party on the iO patio! Come watch the final couples face the public vote to see...
shows.description: Put on your favorite island outfit, and get ready for an evening of romance, drama, and surprises. Superfan Imani Neal is hosting the ultimate Love Island Finale Watch Party on the iO patio! Come watch the final couples face the public vote to see who walks away with the cash, and who leaves single. 6:00 PM: Doors open 7:30 PM: Pre-Show Trivia 8:00 PM: Finale Screening Live (projected HUGE on the patio) Expect themed drinks, trivia, and more. RSVP to lock in your FREE spot in the Villa before it's full! _____________________ Additional option to include our themed cocktail, "Do Bits Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Charm Scene 100 - The LIVE 100th Episode
shows.excerpt: Chicago's most charming improvised musical podcast - live at iO! It's a music improv experience unlike any other as Lily Ludwig, Austin Packard, Musical Director Sam Scheidler, and drummer Chris Ditton create a brand new musical — completely on th...
shows.description: Chicago's most charming improvised musical podcast - live at iO! It's a music improv experience unlike any other as Lily Ludwig, Austin Packard, Musical Director Sam Scheidler, and drummer Chris Ditton create a brand new musical — completely on the fly. Come be a part of our 100th episode extravaganza! Collectively, the Charm Scene team has performed with Baby Wants Candy and Shamilton at The Second City, Laura Hall and Lisa McQueen's Improvised Broadway , Tuesday Musical Improv at Annoyance Theatre, Marquee at iO Theater, RIFF , Lost Realms , and more. Members of Charm Scene have performed with Off Book: The Improvised Musical , the Second City Touring Company, Jackbox Games, and at the Edinburgh Fringe Festival. Want a sneak peek? We've got new episodes every Tuesday – wherever you get your podcasts. Welcome to The Scene!

shows.title: Deep Schwa
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa h...
shows.description: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa has over 50 members, has done over 1,000 shows, performed in theaters all over Chicago and beyond. Made up of a cast of Chicago's most seasoned and eclectic players and teachers it's a show perfect for the improv initiate and those just looking to chase away the Sunday scaries. Every Sunday, 29 years and counting. "Top-tier!" - AV Club "Legitimate." - Guy on Yelp "The most chaotic 'pro' team." - Redditor Cast: Jill Fenstermaker Liz Kirkwood Steve Nelson Eddie Piña Megan Redfearn Cassidy Russell Andy Stegmeyer Craig Uhlir Anthony LeBlanc IG: @deepschwa

shows.description: This is an Improv Show without men, the way it was intended and we can’t wait to hear your tiny little sad dicks giggling in the audience. STOP!!!! Look at this quote, it’s infuriating! “Men apply for a job when they meet only 60% of the qualifications, but women apply only if they meet 100% of them.” -From the Harvard Business Review The revolution starts now. Watch as a rotating cast of NYC’s best improvisers destroy the stage with their wit, wisdom and undeniable talent. Help us make this show so big, we HAVE to make t-shirts on Cafe-press. Featuring: Shannon O’Neill and more TBA! —- In-person tickets are $15 plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: SuB’WAY Series: The Improvised Baseball Musicals
shows.description: Batter up! It’s time for the Magnet Theater’s biggest Mets and Yankees fans to go head-to-head to battle for New York musical improv supremacy! Fans of each local team will take turns inning by inning telling two separate narrative musicals. Who will earn the ultimate bragging rights?? The audience decides! Baseball never sounded so funny! Get your peanuts and Cracker Jacks, then leave them at home, because food is not permitted in the theater! But come out anyway! Grand slams galore! Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets SuB’WAY Series: The Improvised Baseball Musicals Sun Jul 12th, 2026 9:00pm - $10 Buy Ticket

shows.title: The Incubator: Jinx + LOHAN
shows.excerpt: Looking for the best live improv comedy in Los Angeles? The Incubator at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is a must-see monthly show featuring the next generation of performers alongside some of UCB’s most exciting veteran teams—all on one stage.…
shows.description: Looking for the best live improv comedy in Los Angeles? The Incubator at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is a must-see monthly show featuring the next generation of performers alongside some of UCB’s most exciting veteran teams—all on one stage. This unique double-bill improv show brings together two distinct voices in long-form improv: a rising Lloyd team and a graduated Harold team. This cycle, catch LOHAN as they workshop an entirely new show over a 12-week run. It’s a rare opportunity to see top-tier improvisers experiment, refine, and build something brand new in real time. The Incubator delivers an unforgettable night of live comedy, featuring both emerging talent and established UCB performers. —— Featuring: Jinx & LOHAN — LOHAN Caroline Cotter, Joe Fahey, Lyndsey Frank, Molly Kiernan, PJ McCormick, Anna Rajo, Greg Roman, Sean Smith Complete List of Lloyd Teams: Freak Trap Hanna Barlow, Jorge Berrios, Prerika Chawla, Nicolette DeMarco, Charlie Fay, Nate Lawler, Talia Lefkowitz, Yaki Margulies Jinx Abby Blanchard, Sam Bodenstein, Catt Crawford, Andrew Farmer, Celia Gurney, Balint Hancz, Dorshae Middleton, Jasmine Wattar PTO Alfred Aquino II, Koschka Bahr, Justin Carty, Olivia Connolly, Sean Coyle, Molly Doan, Joe Kady, Justin Page — All sales are final. shows.title: SOLID: a stand-up comedy show
shows.excerpt: An evening of stand-up comedy featuring the best comics in the city! Hosted by Joe Kwaczala (Comedy Central) and Clare O'Kane (Saturday Night Live), SOLID is a stand-up comedy show that features the funniest comics in Los Angeles at an affordable price. These…
shows.description: An evening of stand-up comedy featuring the best comics in the city! Hosted by Joe Kwaczala (Comedy Central) and Clare O’Kane ( Saturday Night Live ), SOLID is a stand-up comedy show that features the funniest comics in Los Angeles at an affordable price. These are comedians who have performed all across the country and on your TV screens, and now here they are at UCB! shows.title: Big Tobacco’s Pinocchio
shows.excerpt: Remember Pinocchio? He’s back. And he’s been asking about you. You might know Big Tobacco from their hit Edinburgh Fringe comedy show, Bad Play. Or maybe you know them from their hilarious live fake-ish sitcom, Living Situation. Or maybe you’re…
shows.description: Remember Pinocchio? He’s back. And he’s been asking about you. You might know Big Tobacco from their hit Edinburgh Fringe comedy show, Bad Play . Or maybe you know them from their hilarious live fake-ish sitcom, Living Situation . Or maybe you’re confusing them with the cigarette conglomerates of the same name (no relation). Either way, the comedy troupe is back with a reimagining of Pinocchio that turns the classic tale on its head and packs it with jokes, twists, absurdity, and maybe even some heart for all the pervs out there. Join Pinocchio, Jiminy, Geppetto, and The Blue Fairy on an outrageous journey to discover what life is all about in this final LA performance before the show begins its run at the Edinburgh Fringe Festival. Cast: Brad Beideman, Brian Fitzgerald, Lyndsey Kempf, Eli Lutsky — Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. Link will remain accessible for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: Experimental Mic
shows.excerpt: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians…
shows.description: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians to push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. From themed sets and tag-team comedy to audience challenges and heckle-friendly rounds, it brings a fresh lineup of inventive formats designed to keep performers and audiences on their toes. Whether you’re a seasoned comic testing new material or a first-timer stepping into the spotlight, Experimental Mic is the perfect space to get weird, wild, and wonderfully hilarious. Come see comedians experiment, fail gloriously, and maybe create something brilliant. It’s raw, unfiltered, and absolutely hilarious. You don’t want to miss it. Each comic gets 5 minutes. 15 performance spots available. Come put your name in the bucket at 7pm to see if you’re chosen. Hosted by Deric Brown — This show is free! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: Frankly, My Frank, I Don’t Give A Frank
shows.excerpt: A heart-warming solo show of staggering indulgence! Frankly, My Frank blends characters and storytelling for an evening of humor and heart. Caught in the one second between life and death, a man must reconcile his life choices while navigating the…
shows.description: A heart-warming solo show of staggering indulgence! Frankly, My Frank blends characters and storytelling for an evening of humor and heart. Caught in the one second between life and death, a man must reconcile his life choices while navigating the ridiculous characters in his head including a Shakespearean Baseball Coach, a disgruntled Buca di Beppo server, and an acid-induced gargoyle. Written & performed by Frank Caeti ( MADtv , Modern Family , Jimmy Kimmel Live ) www.frankcaeti.com “Frank’s characters are as sublime as they are joyfully ridiculous and his unwavering commitment to them truly makes them burn bright.” — The Comedy Bureau LA “It brought tears to my eyes from being both belly-achingly funny and earth-shatteringly truthful. Frank Caeti plays multiple facets of himself with ease, shifting into fully-fledged characters in the blink of an eye and showcasing their depth and their humor to the audience’s delight. He has crafted one of the most unique one-man shows I’ve seen that will stay with me for a long time. Go see it!” — Dramaworks — Livestream tickets are $10. shows.title: Show & Tell for Grown-Ups
shows.venue: iO Theater - Second Floor: The Weed Cabaret
venues: iO Theater - Second Floor: The Weed Cabaret
shows.excerpt: Give a nerd a microphone. Set a timer. Learn something cool! Show & Tell for Grown-Ups invites enthusiasts and experts to sign up for their slot to tell us why something is cool. We host the show live onstage and have Q&A with the audience! After...
shows.description: Give a nerd a microphone. Set a timer. Learn something cool! Show & Tell for Grown-Ups invites enthusiasts and experts to sign up for their slot to tell us why something is cool. We host the show live onstage and have Q&A with the audience! After two years of meeting cool nerds all over Chicago, we're here at iO for our Monthly Showcase of Chicago's Coolest Nerds every 3rd Wednesday of the month! We're an introvert friendly show! No one is forced to participate, but if you're interested, we do have audience participation parts. The topics and presenters are different every show. What stays constant is that it's a night of having fun, learning something, and making friends. We can't wait for you to join us! Check us out on Instagram @tellmewhyitscool_show for topic previews, show recaps, and more.

shows.title: The FREE WEDNESDAY SHOW feat Dumb John and Birdlady
shows.excerpt: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Bird...
shows.description: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Birdlady in a new weekly long form improv show. Both teams apply their high energy strain of improvisation to a bizarre cultural harvest of small town Americana influence and ephemera, using a single audience suggestion to inspire a piece of unhinged long form improv that propels diesel-soaked characters through fever dream karaoke scenes and down neon aisles of roadside antique marts; exploring the depravity and brilliance found at the heart of every moment. Take flight with two back to back original iO ensembles, Birdlady and Dumb John! Every Wednesday night at 7:30 (FREE), watch as they migrate toward their ultimate destination: hilarious long-form improvisation! It’ll be a HOOT! They’re so funny this show should be Ill-EAGLE! People can’t stop RAVEN about this show! DOORS: 7:00pm SHOW: 7:30pm Birdlady is: Ali Khan Alonso Ramirez Daryn Robinson Devin Henderson Erin Washington Justin Parlette Lauren Frost Ryan Nolan Dumb John is: Mike Geraghty Steve Plock Linda Orr Traycie Mcbee Follow our teams on Instagram at @birdlady.io & @dumbjohn

shows.title: Dating Dell'Amico
shows.excerpt: Join Sarah Dell'Amico (Second City Mainstage Alum, The Improvised Shakespeare Company) as she "dates" a different friend each week. "Dating Dell'Amico" is a completely improvised show that will take audiences on the journey of couples date night. ...
shows.description: Join Sarah Dell'Amico (Second City Mainstage Alum, The Improvised Shakespeare Company) as she "dates" a different friend each week. "Dating Dell'Amico" is a completely improvised show that will take audiences on the journey of couples date night. Audiences will shout out a number between 1 and 50 and whatever number is given will be the number date the couple will be on. Dating is like wine tasting. The first glass is a hell of a lot different than the 12th. You'll gulp, you'll savor, you'll wish you had more wine. Budget friendly, chemistry heavy, and fully improvised - "Dating Dell'Amico" explores a couple's relationship and all of the other characters the couple might encounter on their date. Fantastic Improv teams from all over Chicago will open the show getting you emotionally committed for the date you are about to see blossom. "My ideal first date? This. You. Wednesday nights in July. 7:30 PM. iO Theatre." - Sarah Dell'Amico and Jenny Aniston.

No problem, single players are welcome and will form their own group--a great chance to meet new people and expand your improv comedy network. Signups: 8:30PM Show: 9PM

shows.description: Get a chance to perform with a rotating cast of your favorite UCB teachers, or just sit back and enjoy the lesson. Night School is in session, but we swear it’ll be fun this time. Come watch a rotating cast of UCB teachers perform improv. If you’re feeling like you want extra credit, drop your name in the bucket for a chance to perform with teachers during the show! Anyone who is a current or former UCB student (improv, sketch, character, etc. all welcome!) is welcome to drop your name in the bucket. Hosts: Caroline Cotter, Marshall Givens, Sylvie Wang — This show is Free! Everybody get in here. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. shows.title: Insignificant Mile
shows.excerpt: Every Wednesday, this group of Annoyance Program graduates performs The Insignificant Mile, a creative twist on a classic form in which players create a strip mall through audience suggestion. Each show features four unique locations, and a
shows.description: Every Wednesday, this group of Annoyance Program graduates performs The Insignificant Mile, a creative twist on a classic form in which players create a strip mall through audience suggestion. Each show features four unique locations, and a brand new cast of characters that exist in the world they created. With new guest openers every week, the Insignificant Mile is sure to leave a significant impact on audiences!

shows.title: Jury Duty
shows.excerpt: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and
shows.description: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and total chaos. Watch as the foreperson loses their mind, evidence makes things worse, and deliberations go off the rails. No script, no rules, no justice. Just comedy The trial is fake, the laughs are real

shows.title: The Fizz Show: Carbonated Chicago Comedy
shows.excerpt: Join iO house team Fizz for Chicago's most carbonated improv show. Wednesdays at 10 p.m., Fizz cracks open a high-octane, full-sugar set of one-night-only scenes, characters and stories with a special guest opener. Plus: Each week one resident Fi...
shows.description: Join iO house team Fizz for Chicago's most carbonated improv show. Wednesdays at 10 p.m., Fizz cracks open a high-octane, full-sugar set of one-night-only scenes, characters and stories with a special guest opener. Plus: Each week one resident Fizzicist must complete their assigned task or be sentenced to a sip of the foul-flavored FIZZ CUP. Will they Fizz or Flop? Come find out! Cast: Bailey Salicos Hadley Singer Janelle Soulliere Kara Kinsey Lily Kerr-Jung Marino Korellis Max Reichek Traer Schon Veronica Rooney

shows.title: Thursday Night Improv Hosted by Creamboy
shows.excerpt: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener f...
shows.description: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener for veteran iO house team Creamboy every week. Every show is completely different, so you can keep coming back for more! Will you be the lucky audience member to receive the coveted title of Cream of the Week? Creamboy is made up of seasoned Chicago improvisers who play and teach all over the city (and country! And WORLD?!) which means this show is perfect for improv nerds, millennials who love Tina Fey, and even your cousin visiting from Kansas. Comedy so good you'll lick your lips and pat your belly. Mmmm so creamy! Get a taste of Creamboy on Instagram @ creamboy.io

shows.title: Improv: The Play
shows.excerpt: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never ...
shows.description: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never given a script, and must improvise their way through the scene. The result is a totally original, never before seen piece of theater. It’s drama, it’s comedy, it’s everything that’s magical about theater and improvisation. Come watch this brand-new show at iO and see something you won’t see anywhere else in the city. Featuring: Alex Beard Heather Mari Elijah Sloan Lexi Putter Lucas Pollitzer Marino Korellis Montrez Hawkins Nikk Tetreault Ryan Bowman Shawna Seals Directed by: James Dugan Produced by: Cory Hardin

shows.title: Josephs Tonight
shows.excerpt: Josephs Tonight is an improvised late-night talk show where the catch is that there are two hosts. Joe is a grumpy elder millennial comedian who “really needs this”. Joey is a Gen Z free spirit who just wants to have a good time. Audiences will le...
shows.description: Josephs Tonight is an improvised late-night talk show where the catch is that there are two hosts. Joe is a grumpy elder millennial comedian who “really needs this”. Joey is a Gen Z free spirit who just wants to have a good time. Audiences will leave saying, "Oh, this is why there’s normally just the one host." Come for the variety, stay for the drama. Cast: Joey Costello as Joey the Co-Host Joe Yoon as Joe the Co-Host Sean Michaels as Sean the Stage Manager Stay tuned for special guest announcements! Directed by Holly Kuldell

shows.description: A night of comedy about Generational Fuckery! Inspired by the hit podcast Everybody Knows But Me, The F*cked Up Family Hour is a night of stand-up comedy about family secrets, scandals, and the people who screwed us up royally. What could possibly go wrong? Presented by Everybody Knows But Me – a top-charting Apple Podcasts show and Amazon Music Best Podcast of the Week – this live show invites audiences back into EKBM’s uniquely nostalgic world, where childhood memories are revisited with equal parts affection and the lingering question: what the actual hell, mom and dad? shows.title: Draft Night
shows.excerpt: Teams are drafted the first week, then perform for the rest of the month. Week 1: 3 Coaches host the show and draw their teams RANDOMLY from the chalice of audience submitted names. The newly drafted teams perform short scrimmage sets! Weeks 2-4:...
shows.description: Teams are drafted the first week, then perform for the rest of the month. Week 1: 3 Coaches host the show and draw their teams RANDOMLY from the chalice of audience submitted names. The newly drafted teams perform short scrimmage sets! Weeks 2-4: Teams perform weekly at Draft Night and get notes from their coach. Wash, Rinse, Repeat! *This is not a competition show* Rules: -You must be at Draft Night to enter the drawing -You must have completed at least two WGIS classes (not counting drop-ins) -People selected will pay $15 for their month of coach notes. Scholarships available upon request to shows@wgimprovschool.com All this same info and a bit more is listed here: https://wgimprovschool.com/draftnight

shows.title: Blueprint
shows.excerpt: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected ...
shows.description: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected as we build something completely original, live, right before your eyes. Past forms have included: Improvised Severance - Guided by two internal "staff members," three performers are physically out of the room, while three others perform as their innies, and every 5 minutes, the two swapped. Can they make sense of their outies? and versa? Understudies - In a longform narrative, each player on stage knows that they will eventually understudy another player in the show. The lights change and they have to embody a different player, and each time the lights change, they can select another player to embody. Overachiever - Three 2-person monoscenes happen on stage, utilizing the same physical space, but taking place in categorically different spaces. They must navigate space atop of and around one another while keeping connection to their partner. Improvised Heist - Ocean's Eleven, eat your heart out! Our players hit the major plot points of a heist and improvise their way through - initial idea, building the team, planning the heist, executing, and the aftermath Blueprint is joined each week by a lab cast opening for the show with their own unique, original form. Directed by James Dugan Cast: James Dugan Avery Ford Molly Jones Allen Lucas Janelle Soulliere Ryan Bowman

shows.description: Calling all fans of musical improv - and all you curious first-timers! Come on down to the Magnet Theater Hotel & Casino every THIRD THURSDAY of the month for a neon-blazing night of mixing, mingling, and making up scenes into sensational songs, BABY! Hosted by the one, the only, the FABULOUS Las Vegas Lounge Legend Trudy Carmichael, the Musical Magnet Mixer is a sparkling, ultra-supportive musical improv jam featuring a different Musical Megawatt team every month - plus live accompaniment from the absolutely irresistible Musical Mixer Orchestra. No prior improv or singing experience whatsoever required! Whether you’re ready to jump in and roll the dice, or lounge like royalty on the sidelines sipping a metaphorical martini, participation is always optional… enthusiasm, however, is strongly encouraged! shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Featuring: Winslow understands our loved ones – they plague our lives with never-ending texts, chain emails, and accidental butt dials. You give us your weird family messages, and we’ll spin it into a cozy improv sweater of absolute chaos. “One of UCBTLA’s most fun house teams.” – Splitsider Cast: Mano Agapion, Echo Kellum, Justin Michael, Gilli Nissim, Mary Sasson & Queen George performs a fast-paced improv show based on just a one-word suggestion from the audience. We’re offering $5 shots of liquid courage (rotating liquor) and the Home Remedy: a craft cocktail consisting of Jack Daniel’s Blackberry, sour mix, and tonic water. shows.title: ASIAN AF JAM!

shows.description: A completely *FREE* jam for AAPI improvisers of all experience levels! Whether you’ve never tried improv before, are a current student, or an established improviser who wants to try something new, this jam is a low pressure *FREE* opportunity for improvisers who identify as Asian, Asian American or Pacific Islander to perform with veterans of the UCB stage ON the UCB MainStage! Non-AAPI identifying improvisers are welcome to attend and support the work as members of the audience! Please note: this is a jam, NOT a class, so we won’t be teaching the conventions of the form — just playing sets! You are more than welcome to join in the fun regardless of prior experience. No reservations needed — just show up and jam! Hosted by members Asian AF NY team Joy F*ck Club : Nicole Asava (HBO), Donald Chang (HBO), Sean Chang (Magnet, UCB), Alex Cheng (NPR), Ryan Chittaphong (Story Pirates), Jenny Arimoto (Asian Not Asian), Kurt Cruz ( kukomusic.com ), Florence Friebe (Karmila Music), Fu Goto (RaaaatScraps), Risa Harms (McSweeney’s), Aakash Kesavarapu (NY Comedy Festival), Kendra Singh (Reductress), Achilles Stamatelaky (Audible), Akmal Tajihan (Duchovny), Alex Yang (UCB), & Angel Yau (HBO)!

In One-Hour Photo, Spaghetti will ask each member of the audience to send a (safe-for-work) photo they've taken. They will then pick one photo at random, interview the photographer about the photo, and perform their unique (and often unhinged) brand of improv comedy based on the photo and the interview. shows.title: Scott Green Lies to Your Kids
shows.excerpt: It’s the all-ages magic show that’s actually fun for all ages. This is not a sweet, gentle, clap-along children’s show. Magician Scott Green (Penn & Teller: Fool Us; Chicago Bulls team magician; WGN; ABC; Fox; ESPN) brings the heat: an unhinged, u...
shows.description: It’s the all-ages magic show that’s actually fun for all ages. This is not a sweet, gentle, clap-along children’s show. Magician Scott Green ( Penn & Teller: Fool Us ; Chicago Bulls team magician; WGN; ABC; Fox; ESPN) brings the heat: an unhinged, unpredictable performance packed with how-the-%*#&-did-he-do-that moments and side-splitting comedy. The laughter is infectious—as a stand-up, Scott is a regular at Zanies Comedy Club and has been featured at comedy festivals across North America (Laugh After Dark, Vermont Comedy Festival, Athens Comedy Festival, and more). Is this a show where kids bring their grownups, or a show where grownups bring their kids? The answer is yes.

shows.excerpt: ASIAN AF (Asian As F**k) is the premier Asian American comedy variety show in the nation, and is thrilled to be back in New York City at UCB! The show spotlights some of the funniest Asian American actors, stand-up comedians, improvisers, sketch…
shows.description: ASIAN AF (Asian As F**k) is the premier Asian American comedy variety show in the nation, and is thrilled to be back in New York City at UCB! The show spotlights some of the funniest Asian American actors, stand-up comedians, improvisers, sketch performers, musicians, storytellers and more… from TV, film, and stages across the U.S. The show has been featured on several news sites such as The New York Times, LA Times, NBC News, ABC News, Vulture, SoCal Public Radio (KPCC), and more. Featured performers: Stand-up from Nathan Pearson (Goodbye Party, Characters Welcome) & Aarushi Agni (McSweeney’s, Emoji: The Hieroglyphics of Our Time, or how I learned to stop worrying and send the risky text), and a performance and interview with Jiji Lee (The New Yorker, The Onion)! Featuring Improv From The Joy F*ck Club (rotating cast): Nicole Asava (HBO), Donald Chang (HBO), Sean Chang (Magnet, UCB), Alex Cheng (NPR), Ryan Chittaphong (Story Pirates), Jenny Arimoto (Asian Not Asian), Kurt Cruz (kukomusic), Florence Friebe (Karmila Music), Fu Goto (RaaaatScraps), Risa Harms (McSweeney’s), Aakash Kesavarapu (NY Comedy Festival), Kendra Singh (Reductress), Achilles Stamatelaky (Audible), Akmal Tajihan (Duchovny), Alex Yang (UCB), and Angel Yau (HBO)! Asian AF has been the headlining act for several comedy festivals, including SF Sketchfest, The New York Comedy Festival, Asian Comedy Fest, Clusterfest (SF), The Del Close Marathon (NYC/LA), Austin Sketchfest (TX), Baltimore Comedy Festival (MD), The OC Improv Festival (CA), Hartford Improv Fest (CT), The Hawaii Comedy Festival (HI), SteelStacks Improv Comedy Festival (PA), 2nd Best Fest (Richmond, VA), the District Improv Festival (Washington, D.C), Das Improv Fest (Germany), the Edinburgh International Improv Festival (Scotland), and many more! Asian AF was selected as part of the 2023 and 2024 Comedy Seasons at The Kennedy Center in Washington, D.C. Hosted by The Joy F*ck Club! —- Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the s

Maude Night graduates Smokeshow take over UCB Theatre’s Saturday night with an explosive new sketch comedy show that is unhinged, unfiltered, and unbelievably funny. Featuring some of LA’s funniest comedians and UCB’s top sketch comedy talent, this live comedy event is the perfect way to spend a Saturday night on the town or live-streamed direct to your home. If you’re looking for a Saturday night comedy show in Los Angeles featuring Hollywood’s best comedians and rising stars, then Smokeshow is the sketch comedy team you’ve got to see to believe. Smokeshow is a sketch comedy team formed in the 2024-25 Maude Night season and featuring some of LA’s most exciting comedians. Members of the team have appeared in St. Denis Medical (NBC), America’s Got Talent (NBC), Ghostbusters: Afterlife (Sony Pictures), Strays (Universal Pictures) and more. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Danny Forster Sat Jul 11th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie Rivera Amie Roe Matthew Shafeek Elena Skopetos Billy Soco Steve Whyte

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Never Not Murder
shows.excerpt: Never Not Murder steps into 1944 Chicago, where honest detective Frankie King navigates a dangerous world of love, betrayal, and corruption while racing to stop a powerful figure’s rise to mayor. This stylish film noir embraces classic tropes—femm...
shows.description: Never Not Murder steps into 1944 Chicago, where honest detective Frankie King navigates a dangerous world of love, betrayal, and corruption while racing to stop a powerful figure’s rise to mayor. This stylish film noir embraces classic tropes—femme fatales, tangled relationships, and moral dilemmas—while reinventing them for the stage. A sharp, witty narrator breaks the fourth wall, guiding audiences through the twists and secrets of the story. Meanwhile, a visible, ever-moving “crew” interacts with both actors and audience, transforming the entire theater into a dynamic, immersive experience.

shows.description: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It’s a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will be good, some will be bad but it will all be weird and new and that’s what makes it fun! It’s experimental sketch at its finest! Come on, you know you need a spanking. This Monday, we have… MAGIC MIC: Two friends, on the brink of graduation, embark on a night full of comedy, self-discovery, and… male stripping? Thirty minutes before the final performance of Sam and Frank’s college career, they anxiously wait in the green room as buried tensions begin to surface. When Frank reveals a dire secret, their future together becomes uncertain, they must make a decision: do they follow through or does the dream die with their last performance? It’s a night full of comedy, self-discovery, and… male stripping? Magic Mic is a bold two-person comedy that explores the themes of vulnerability, friendship, and believing in yourself (AND also male stripping). It premiered last summer at the Hollywood Fringe Festival where it had a sold-out run and won the “BEST OF FEURY” award! It’s a show that blends comedy, music, dance. Oh and, it blends male stripping too. Most importantly, it’s a show that was created with the goal of encouraging other young theater makers in LA, like ourselves, to dive headfirst into creating, even when it feels daunting. Featuring: Frankie Alvarez Lora & Sam Pozen — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience
shows.excerpt: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience Finally, an improv show that will make you want to go to jury duty! “The Trial” improvises a tense courtroom trial right before your eyes -- from dramatic opening statements to thrilling verdict. The first…
shows.description: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience Finally, an improv show that will make you want to go to jury duty! “The Trial” improvises a tense courtroom trial right before your eyes — from dramatic opening statements to thrilling verdict. The first half of the show is a “Spokane” form in the courtroom; we flash back-and-forth in time from the courtroom to the events pertinent to the trial, all the while “seeing” testimony, witnesses, and evidence along the way. The second half of the show is a Monoscene taking place during deliberations as a jury decides the fate of the accused. Can you handle the truth??? Cast: Lauren Arnett, Ryan Barker, Sydney Bossuk, Zachary Clark, Lida Darmian, Jon Dimakopoulos, Ben Hirsch, John Kennedy, Sophia Kinne, Ryan Leach, Sebastian Martinez, Mary McDonnell, Vince Moran, Tom Powers, Mandy Ranero, Tyler Stuart, Kristen Tucker, and Jeff Wucher —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show Livestream tickets are $10. shows.title: Big Grande Live!

shows.description: Big Grande hops onto the UCB stage for a live improv show that will leave you laughing (hopefully), and them sweating (definitely). Big Grande has been bringing their brand of rapid, honest, and wild live shows to sold out crowds around the country, hell, the continent, for over a decade. Join them for a show that leaves you laughing (hopefully) and them sweating (definitely). Big Grande is Dan Lippert, Jon Mackey, Ryan Rosenberg, and Drew Tarver . Their podcast, The Teachers Lounge, gained a fervent following on The Earwolf Network before they began selling it directly to fans. You can find it, along with their four episode live improvised comedy special, sketches, animated content, merch, and more at biggrandewebsite.com. Individually, you’ve seen them on The Other Two, Brooklyn 99, Paranormal Activity: Next of Kin, Superstore, Comedy Bang Bang, Son of Zorn, Bless the Harts, Playing House, and of course, Last Call with Carson Daly – as well as behind the camera on Lights Out with David Spade and Netflix: After Party. — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: The Incubator: PTO + LOHAN
shows.excerpt: Looking for the best live improv comedy in Los Angeles? The Incubator at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is a must-see monthly show featuring the next generation of performers alongside some of UCB’s most exciting veteran teams—all on one stage.…
shows.description: Looking for the best live improv comedy in Los Angeles? The Incubator at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is a must-see monthly show featuring the next generation of performers alongside some of UCB’s most exciting veteran teams—all on one stage. This unique double-bill improv show brings together two distinct voices in long-form improv: a rising Lloyd team and a graduated Harold team. This cycle, catch LOHAN as they workshop an entirely new show over a 12-week run. It’s a rare opportunity to see top-tier improvisers experiment, refine, and build something brand new in real time. The Incubator delivers an unforgettable night of live comedy, featuring both emerging talent and established UCB performers. —— Featuring: PTO & LOHAN — LOHAN Caroline Cotter, Joe Fahey, Lyndsey Frank, Molly Kiernan, PJ McCormick, Anna Rajo, Greg Roman, Sean Smith Complete List of Lloyd Teams: Freak Trap Hanna Barlow, Jorge Berrios, Prerika Chawla, Nicolette DeMarco, Charlie Fay, Nate Lawler, Talia Lefkowitz, Yaki Margulies Jinx Abby Blanchard, Sam Bodenstein, Catt Crawford, Andrew Farmer, Celia Gurney, Balint Hancz, Dorshae Middleton, Jasmine Wattar PTO Alfred Aquino II, Koschka Bahr, Justin Carty, Olivia Connolly, Sean Coyle, Molly Doan, Joe Kady, Justin Page — All sales are final. shows.excerpt: Experience an unforgettable night of wonder at Magic Mondays!! Starring award-winning magician John Sturk, this monthly showcase features Chicago's top conjurors performing mind-blowing illusions and spellbinding tricks. Join us for an evening of ...
shows.description: Experience an unforgettable night of wonder at Magic Mondays!! Starring award-winning magician John Sturk, this monthly showcase features Chicago's top conjurors performing mind-blowing illusions and spellbinding tricks. Join us for an evening of magic, mystery, and mesmerizing entertainment—perfect for magic lovers and those looking for a night out with a twist! Don't miss your chance to witness the impossible. John Sturk is an award-winning comedy magician from Chicago. He has been seen on ABC, NBC, WGN, Fox, and The Travel Channel. He’s also graced the stages of The Second City, iO Chicago, The Annoyance Theater, Malarkey Theater, and countless living rooms and backyards throughout the midwest. In 2023, he served as National President of The Society of American Magicians, the oldest magic association in the world. In addition to magic, John is also one of Chicago’s most accomplished music directors, having been seen behind the keyboards of Chicago’s comedy institutions. He also is an official artist for Hammond Organs USA.

shows.description: Full of Bones Films a Special!! We have a camera. We have a crew. All we need? A one word suggestion of anything at all. Full of Bones is filming another Improv special!! After performing to sold out crowds across the country at the New York Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, iO Fest, Hartford, and Fun & Dumb they decided to take their talents to the big screen (YouTube… but maybe more). Now, with the help of Another Wednesday Productions, we’re doing it again at the prestigious UCB Theater in New York. Full of Bones is comprised of Tony Ferraro, Robert Johnston, Meredith Dietz, Mark Burns, Chris Tucker, and Madeline Wolfson. They have been described as having “broken brains” and being “rotten to the core”. Full of Bones promises to deliver a phrenetic, absurd, and straight up silly hour of improv that’s guaranteed to tickle your funny bone. Featuring: Mark Burns, Tony Ferraro, Robert Johnston, Madeline Wolfson, Meredith Dietz, and Chris Tucker —- In-person tickets are $15 plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. shows.description: All Out! is UCB’s newest LGBTQ+forward stand-up open mic for queer-identifying comics and allies! All Out! is UCB’s brand new LGBTQ+ focussed monthly stand-up open mic here to cultivate a safe, supportive space for queer-identifying comics (and allies!) to take risks, build community and have fun! Come through every 3rd Tuesday to see some of L.A.’s funniest comics-on-the-rise as they try out new material, fine-tune their tight five and let those pride flags fly. Comic sign-ups are in person on the day of lottery style, so arrive 5-10 minutes early to throw your name in the bucket for a 5 minute set (10 slots total). We encourage everyone to stay for the entire show to celebrate and support each other, so as an added incentive one name will be drawn (from all comics remaining by show’s end) to get a juicy 10 minute set in next month’s show! Hosted by Koschka Bahr — Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.description: A fantasy musical where the dice control the story! Hail and well met, traveler! Grab a pint of ale and pull up a chair to watch as some of the best bards LA has to offer embark on a completely improvised musical quest, where every success and failure is dictated by a roll of the dice. Will the heroes save the princess? Will the BBEG (Big Bad Evil Guy) prevail and shroud the world in darkness? Will the players put way too much focus on an NPC the Dungeon Master came up with as a bit? Nobody knows! But whatever happens, we’re sure as the nine hells gonna sing about it.
