shows.title: Experimental Mic
shows.excerpt: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians…
shows.description: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians to push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. From themed sets and tag-team comedy to audience challenges and heckle-friendly rounds, it brings a fresh lineup of inventive formats designed to keep performers and audiences on their toes. Whether you’re a seasoned comic testing new material or a first-timer stepping into the spotlight, Experimental Mic is the perfect space to get weird, wild, and wonderfully hilarious. Come see comedians experiment, fail gloriously, and maybe create something brilliant. It’s raw, unfiltered, and absolutely hilarious. You don’t want to miss it. Each comic gets 5 minutes. 15 performance spots available. Come put your name in the bucket at 7pm to see if you’re chosen. Hosted by Deric Brown — This show is free! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: The Drop: An Open Clown Rehearsal
shows.excerpt: Here’s your chance to see how a clown show is built from absolutely nothing. And it’s completely free! Clown Boss Chad Damiani is building a brand-new clown ensemble show. One that mixes modern clown with elements of improv, sketch and…
shows.description: Here’s your chance to see how a clown show is built from absolutely nothing. And it’s completely free! Clown Boss Chad Damiani is building a brand-new clown ensemble show. One that mixes modern clown with elements of improv, sketch and stand-up. Every third Wednesday of the month from 12-2pm, he’s bringing together some of the best people from all these worlds to play together and explore the unknown – in the hopes of finding a fresh and unique one-hour format. In clown work, this devising process is made open to the public. We want an audience to see our failures and successes, adding to the sense of risk and allowing performers to experiment with different audience games. Audience members can ask questions and participate in a talk-back at 2pm. See great artists take big risks and the discoveries that can happen when you make all the wrong choices. — Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.excerpt: This ticket admits entry to Comedy Dance Chicago performance on July 23 at 7:00pm ONLY. Comedy Dance Chicago at iO Theater! DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES Experience the Best of Comedy Dance Chicago! This high-energy laugh-riot feature...
shows.description: This ticket admits entry to Comedy Dance Chicago performance on July 23 at 7:00pm ONLY. Comedy Dance Chicago at iO Theater! DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES Experience the Best of Comedy Dance Chicago! This high-energy laugh-riot features fan favorites and hilarious hits from the group's first decade of performances. A joyful mashup of sketch comedy, physical humor, music, and dance, this show is sure to have you smiling, laughing, and dancing in your seat–you might even end up on stage! With over 105 million views on social media, these dancin' fools have delighted audiences both online and on stage with their relatable humor and infectious energy. From pumpkin spice lattes to good old-fashioned staring contests, Comedy Dance Chicago turns everyday moments into delightfully absurd comedy. Get ready for an endorphin-releasing experience packed with big laughs, big moves, and hilariously unforgettable antics! _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: SAND
shows.excerpt: This ticket admits entry to SAND performance on July 23 at 7:00pm ONLY. SAND at iO Theater! DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES Sand is a Chicago-based improv comedy group that has been performing together since 2009. Named “Chicago’s Best...
shows.description: This ticket admits entry to SAND performance on July 23 at 7:00pm ONLY. SAND at iO Theater! DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES Sand is a Chicago-based improv comedy group that has been performing together since 2009. Named “Chicago’s Best Improv Team” by NewCity, ‘Sand’ is Mike Brunlieb (HBO’s South Side, Comedy Central’s Joe Pera Talks With You, and Netflix’s Trial of the Chicago 7) and Thomas Kelly (Showtime’s Work in Progress, NBC’s Shrink, Chicago Med, and the feature film, Monuments) with the extremely talented musician, Dan Wilcop! Their unique style of improvisation has led to a devoted following and extensive touring in the United States and internationally. A Sand show is often laugh out loud funny and heartfelt in equal measure. Brunlieb and Kelly let their long-form exploration of characters evolve in surprising ways as the show unfolds. “They’re able to tap into a darkness that would lead lesser performers to alienate an audience quickly, And yet they pull it off with a strange sense of empathy that allows for full-on laughter at the most unexpected of topics,” said NewCity Magazine. Sand often puts a realistic, empathetic character in a surreal world where magic and fantasy heighten the situation, creating a dynamic night of improv that bends into performance art. Their style of performance is inspired by documentary film, the darkest of fairy tales, and professional wrestling. _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: CONNOR RATLIFF presents THE ACTING CLASS
shows.excerpt: A one-person improv show disguised as an acting class, from the creator of the Dead Eyes podcast. Professional actor (Widow's Bay, Bob's Burgers, “King Henry” in a recent State Farm ad) and award-winning podcaster (Dead Eyes) CONNOR RATLIFF is a…
shows.description: A one-person improv show disguised as an acting class, from the creator of the Dead Eyes podcast. Professional actor (Widow’s Bay, Bob’s Burgers, “King Henry” in a recent State Farm ad) and award-winning podcaster (Dead Eyes) CONNOR RATLIFF is a classically trained performer who graduated “with honours” from the prestigious Liverpool Institute For Performing Arts over a quarter of a century ago, making his professional debut on the stage of the Royal Court Theatre in London’s West End. During that same year, he also performed at Buckingham Palace for Queen Elizabeth II. In the decades that followed, he has accumulated numerous credits as a star of stage, screen and stream, appearing in multiple Netflix Original Films as well as content on CBS, NBC, FOX, TBS, Nickelodeon, TruTV, Home Box Office, Amazon Prime, Apple TV and the now-defunct comedy platforms, Go90 and Seeso. But none of that matters now. What matters now is CONNOR RATLIFF presents THE ACTING CLASS, an unending series of workshop performances where he will, before your very eyes, demonstrate what acting truly IS. Each performance will be slightly interactive and completely improvised, with occasional opportunities for “students” to participate (from the safety of their position in the audience.) [Sometimes, there will be a guest, and occasionally they will not be announced in advance. Previous “announced” guests include Jack Quaid, Zach Cherry, Patrick Wilson, James III, Jeff Hiller and Griffin Newman; “surprise” guests have included Meg Ryan and Rachel Zegler.] Defiantly self-indulgent and beyond pointless, THE ACTING CLASS is your opportunity to witness the kind of greatness – only slightly appreciated by The Industry – that has kept Connor Ratliff steadily employed for nearly half of the past 10+ years. Praise for Connor Ratliff: “Connor Ratliff is a brilliant and funny comedic performer and actor.” THE NEW YORKER “An Improv Star.” VANITY FAIR “An Improv Ace.” MEN’S JOURNAL “Funny.” THE FINANCIAL TIMES

shows.excerpt: This ticket admits entry to The Sloppy Boys: Live In Concert performance on July 23 at 9:00pm ONLY. The Sloppy Boys LIVE at iO Theater! DOORS: 9:00PM | SHOW: 9:30PM | ALL AGES The Sloppy Boys are a “party rock” band from LA consisting of comedi...
shows.description: This ticket admits entry to The Sloppy Boys: Live In Concert performance on July 23 at 9:00pm ONLY. The Sloppy Boys LIVE at iO Theater! DOORS: 9:00PM | SHOW: 9:30PM | ALL AGES The Sloppy Boys are a “party rock” band from LA consisting of comedians Mike Hanford, Jeff Dutton and Tim Kalpakis. Prior to forming The Sloppy Boys, all three were writer-performers on the sketch comedy show “The Birthday Boys,” produced by Bob Odenkirk, which aired on IFC. Together, the Boys have self-released three albums, Lifelong Vacation, Dancing on the Wind, and Paradiso. Their fourth, Sonic Ranch, was produced by Money Mark (Beastie Boys, Beck) at the legendary Sonic Ranch Studios in Texas. The entire process was captured by director Robert Holguin for his feature-length comedy-rock-doc Blood, Sweat and Beers or How The Sloppy Boys Made an Album on a Farm in West Texas. The Sloppy Boys also host a weekly cocktail-making podcast, ranked a Top 3 Comedy Podcast by Vulture. New episodes drop every Friday. If you'd like to learn more about iO Fest, please visit our website . _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

Four days packed with improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more, featuring over 130 acts from all over the world! Purchasing this 1-Day pass grants access to all General Admission performances taking place over the weekend. Space is limited in every performance venue, so seating is first-come, first-served. This Friday pass for iO Fest 2026 includes admission to the following acts: A Little Conversation Akash Bajpai Arson Awkward Family Dinner Baby Grand Barbara, a Mother Big Freak Black Star Bridal Darty Calamity Quest Cat and George Are Doing Just Fine Creamboy Dan Burger Danielle Steger Finds a Job Devil's Daughter Facebook Marketplace Live: The Game Show Feast Fever Dream Gale Grace Kilpatrick Grown Man Baby HTH Improvised Housewives Internet Online Jacob Mundell Johnathan Anderson Karan Mehra Kaseria Last Night Was Fun Lauren Frost Lavender Throuple Marquee Michelle Improv Mischief Ms. Biscuit One Woman Car Show Play Time Primetime Quest And... Tickets for those specific shows much be purchased separately.*** 1-Day passes are non-transferable and non-refundable. Purchaser must show up to our box office with an ID identical to the name under which they purchased the tickets to receive their day pass. iO Fest is an all-ages event, but due to the improvised nature of our shows, we cannot guarantee the appropriateness of each show for younger audiences. Follow iO on social media to stay up to date with all information related to iO Fest 2026. Purchase the 4-Day pass here to save money on all shows!

shows.description: The Definitive Celebration of America’s Greatest Minds Great Americans is the flagship biographical retrospective series of the American Institute of Importance, the nation’s leading nonprofit dedicated to celebrating the figures who shaped this country. Join Henry Block (The Onion) and some of UCB’s top performers as the Institute inducts a new class of honorees: Scientists. Inventors. Various women in shawls shouting obscenities in public. Through a series of live dramatic presentations, audiences are granted unprecedented access to the lives, legacies, and defining contributions of these essential Americans. Let us be clear: These are the most important people in our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard of them, you’re being hysterical and no one believes you. shows.description: Baby Wants Candy’s improvised hit Hamilton-inspired hip hop homage returns to UCB. New York Times “One of the Top 5 Comedy’s to Catch.” Ever heard of this show “Hamilton”? Shamilton is just like that, but (ahem) better! Expect the same level of hip hop, incredible songs, stunning choreography and powerhouse singing… except made up on the spot! Fresh off a month-long fully sold-out run at the Edinburgh Fringe, musical improv ensemble Baby Wants Candy presents “Shamilton!”, the Hamilton inspired hit hip-hop musical created in 2016 at UCB in LA, with an open run at Chicago’s Second City. Join the Shamilton cast as they improvise an epic musical based on a historical figure of your choosing- from Genghis Khan to Mr. Rogers to Kim Kardashian… to basketball playing superdog Air Bud. It’s the show The Guardian calls “Brilliant 4 stars” The New York Times calls “One of the top 5 comedy shows to catch”. and Lin-Manuel Miranda calls, “cease and desist!” Featuring: Chris Grace, Zeke Nicholson, Ross Bryant, Jess McKenna, Zach Reino, Jiavani, Ashley Ward, Shilpa Das, Derek Demkowicz, John Hartman, Joey Bland, Zheryk Badugu — Tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show. shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: FRIDAY FIX! Leroy & Sentimental Lady
shows.excerpt: UCB's weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA's top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: Come hang with Leroy as they cook up a fresh improv set full of bold opinions,…
shows.description: UCB’s weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA’s top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: Come hang with Leroy as they cook up a fresh improv set full of bold opinions, bad decisions, and bizarre situations! Leroy members have written and performed on Black-ish, Abbott Elementary, Dropout, iCarly, Star Trek: Lower Decks, Grown-ish, Atypical, Comedy Bang! Bang! and more! Cast: Aman Adumer, Mary Anthony, Kimia Behpoornia, Josh Brekhus, Dayna LoBosco, James Mannion, Edgar Momplaisir, Laci Mosley, Mia Schauffler & Sentimental Lady: Deconstructed is bringing you a night of fun, hilarious and even sentimental improv comedy as they deconstruct their own show, right in front of your eyes! And it’ll be funny! We promise, we’ve been performing together for over a decade. With performers from Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Reno 911!, Parks & Rec, Modern Family, Just Roll With It, Key & Peele, Big Little Lies, Brockmire, Children’s Hospital, Conan, Comedy Bang Bang and more! Cast: Suzi Barrett, Johnny Meeks, Hillary Anne Matthews, Alex Berg, Joel Spence, Todd Fasen, Mel Cowan, Alex Fernie — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. shows.title: The Friday Night Sh*w
shows.description: Obnoxious strangers, overbearing bosses and unrequited high school crushes are about to get a piece of your mind… The Friday Night Sh*w invites audience members to offer their repressed rants, cursing-outs and sultry confessions to fuel a fast-paced brawl of hilarity, performed by a fistful of of NYC’s best improvisers and Magnet faculty. Before the show, audience members may anonymously submit written confessions which the improvisers will use onstage. Now, doesn't it feel good to get that off your chest? shows.description: An immersive night of comedy that just might change your life. Welcome to CLOWN HAUL, hosted by the highly immersive elegant performance art clown troupe, FLWLS (pronounced flawless). A heavenly salon where you can experience the mystical world of clowning. Come play, learn, fail, laugh, cry, watch like a pervert, deepen your artistry or maybe even get an elephant tattoo’d on your body — who knows what the night will bring! What we can guarantee is that the comedy will be effervescent and the evening just might change your life. Starring Chad Damiani, Nalini Sharma, Deidre Lee, Caroline Cummings, Emily Maverick and a rotating guest cast of the best clown stars in town! — All sales are final. shows.title: Badpacks: An Improvised Trip
shows.excerpt: Improvisers swap mystery backpacks and justify bizarre props on a chaotic audience chosen trip! Pack your bags for a no holds barred improvised trip – be it a family reunion, camping trip, or work retreat. Before the show, each comedian…
shows.description: Improvisers swap mystery backpacks and justify bizarre props on a chaotic audience chosen trip! Pack your bags for a no holds barred improvised trip – be it a family reunion, camping trip, or work retreat. Before the show, each comedian secretly packs a backpack full of strange and random props. The improvisers exchange backpacks onstage at the beginning of the show and then must use and justify why ‘they’ brought each of the various props on the “trip.” All edible props must be consumed by the unfortunate soul who pulls it out. Hosted by Joseph Elston & Blake Edwards Featuring: Kel Cripe, Toni Adeyemi, Jack Greenberg, Caroline Cianci — Tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show. Livestream tickets are $10. shows.title: clint SLOP
shows.excerpt: Two of NYC’s top indie teams split one hour of longform improv comedy with special guests! The disciples of clint and the bastards of SLOP will merge into one being as they do something no one has ever attempted: split one hour…
shows.description: Two of NYC’s top indie teams split one hour of longform improv comedy with special guests! The disciples of clint and the bastards of SLOP will merge into one being as they do something no one has ever attempted: split one hour of longform improv comedy. Featuring surprise guests! About the teams: Clint – Improv is our prayer, and clint is our god. Your suggestions are wishes granted by god ( clint ). The disciples of clint (Andy Vega, Carly Lant, Dom Finseth, and Emma Campbell) have evangelized at the Steelstacks Improv Festival, conquered the false clint at Fun & Dumb, and embarrassed heretics at UCB’s Cagematch. SLOP – A Brooklyn based comedy creature made out of Grant Cleaveland, Levi Collins, and Joe Harrington. Known for their highly physical, weird ass style, SLOP won 10 rounds of UCB’s Cagematch in 2024. SLOP has performed at iO Fest, Fun & Dumb Improv Festival, and was a Home Team at Brooklyn Comedy Collective in 2024. —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. shows.title: iO Fest '26 Saturday 1-Day Pass
shows.excerpt: iO Fest 2026, Chicago's largest improv festival, returns on July 23-26! Four days packed with improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more, featuring over 130 acts from all over the world! Purchasing this 1-Day pass grants ac...
shows.description: iO Fest 2026, Chicago's largest improv festival, returns on July 23-26! Four days packed with improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more, featuring over 130 acts from all over the world! Purchasing this 1-Day pass grants access to all General Admission performances taking place over the weekend. Space is limited in every performance venue, so seating is first-come, first-served. Shows take place each day approximately from 4 PM to 1 AM. This Saturday pass for iO Fest 2026 includes admission to the following acts: Annaliese Baker Beverly: A Bevy Show Birdlady Blast! Branded Silk Camp Crush Choose Your Own Comedy Christine Ferrera Chugga Chugga The Cure Ate Her D.A.R.E. Dropouts Deck & Balls Diversity Hire Doomscroll Dumb John Edgewood Avenue Eunji Kim E&E Goat Party Hark! Hellmash Help me Help You Help Yourself Hot Metal Playground Improv is Dead Improvised Columbo Jack Layden Matthew Schwartz McGarnacle Newt Work Old Friends Pavlov Pyramid Funnel The Reckoning & Friends Riff City Shotgun Wedding The Show Presents: Dun Dun That Thing You Pull When You Want to Stop Tip Toe Vik Pandya Vivian Burgett Who All Over There Wolf Town Wonderful Woman of Oz The Wretched The Yips Your Favorite Cousin ***Purchase of this 1-Day GA Pass DOES NOT grant admission to any headliner shows: 3Peat, Armando, Astronomy Club, Baby Wants Candy, Claire + Kim, Comedy Dance Chicago, ¡ESCÁNDALO!, Improvised Shakespeare Co., Jackbox Games, James Conklin Memorial Scholarship Show, Parker Callahan, SAND, The Sloppy Boys, UCB Soundtrack, and Unmuted. Tickets for those specific shows much be purchased separately.*** 1-Day passes are non-transferable and non-refundable. Purchaser must show up to our box office with an ID identical to the name under which they purchased the tickets to receive their day pass. iO Fest is an all-ages event, but due to the improvised nature of our shows, we cannot guarantee the appropriateness of each show for younger audiences. Follow iO on social media to stay up to date with all information related to iO Fest 2026. Purchase the 4-Day pass here to save money on all shows!

DOORS: 5:00PM | SHOW: 5:30PM | ALL AGES Baby Wants Candy is a completely improvised, full band musical! Having performed over 3,000 improvised musicals to thousands of fans from Chicago to New York to Singapore to Scotland, this group not only performs in Chicago, New York, and LA but also tours internationally, including multiple sold-out runs at the Edinburgh Fringe Festival! BWC cast & alumni include Aidy Bryant (Saturday Night Live), Jack McBrayer (30 Rock), Peter Gwinn (Colbert Report), Thomas Middleditch (HBO’s Silicon Valley), Lauren Conlan Adams (Kimmy Schmidt), Jessica McKenna (Party Over Here), Nicole Parker (Elephaba in Wickedon Broadway) and many more. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Danny Forster Sat Jul 11th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie Rivera Amie Roe Matthew Shafeek Elena Skopetos Billy Soco Steve Whyte

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Metal Boy Presents: Your Worst Idea
shows.description: Behind every great idea, there are 50 other terrible ones that came first. Your Worst Idea takes the garbage, shines it up, and gives it a second chance. Each show, we'll invite a guest to offer up a never-before-seen work of art (a poem from 7th grade! A terrible sketch! Pages from a diary!). Metal Boy will perform a live reading, then like a phoenix, spin comedy gold from its ashes. The cast of Your Worst Idea includes comedy vets from all over NYC—credits include: Search Party (HBO), Birdgirl and The Venture Bros. (Adult Swim), the Rude Tales of Magic podcast, Baby Wants Candy, Reductress, The Truth podcast, Story Pirates, Improv Everywhere, and UCB Comedy. They also once performed an improv show before a free screening of a Zack Galifiankis movie. shows.title: SpotlightCTRL: Unmuted
shows.excerpt: SpotlightCTRL: UNMUTED is a high-energy live experience where the comedy club meets the block party and collides on stage. Created by Chicago producer and creative director Anna Marisol and hosted by nationally recognized radio and television per...
shows.description: SpotlightCTRL: UNMUTED is a high-energy live experience where the comedy club meets the block party and collides on stage. Created by Chicago producer and creative director Anna Marisol and hosted by nationally recognized radio and television personality Headkrack, UNMUTED blends long-form improvisation, live music, comedy, storytelling, and audience interaction into a one-night-only performance experience built entirely in real time. Backed by a dynamic ensemble of improvisers, musicians, comedians, and special guests, every performance unfolds differently, fueled by live collaboration, emotional honesty, crowd energy, and spontaneous moments that can never be recreated twice. The ensemble includes performers with backgrounds spanning Chicago’s renowned improv institutions, independent theaters, and live performance communities, creating an experience that feels both expertly crafted and completely unpredictable. Blending the excitement of a live concert, the intimacy of a comedy club, and the communal energy of a block party, SpotlightCTRL pushes beyond traditional improv formats to create unforgettable live entertainment audiences feel long after the night ends. No scripts. No safety net. No two shows are ever the same. _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? shows.title: Spank: Come See This Show or Your Whole Family Will Die / Mrs. Mayberry Hires a Temporary Literary Secretary
shows.excerpt: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It's a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will…
shows.description: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It’s a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will be good, some will be bad but it will all be weird and new and that’s what makes it fun! It’s experimental sketch at its finest! Come on, you know you need a spanking. This Monday, we have… Come See This Show or Your Whole Family Will Die: Growing Up with OCD A comedic take on the absurdities of growing up with OCD (Obsessive Compulsive Disorder). From UCB trained Sketch Writer and Mental Health Advocate Julia Doogan comes a freshly unique take on the absurdities of growing up with Obsessive Compulsive Disorder. The (mostly) true tale follows a childhood Julia ( Claire Wunschel ) as she’s introduced to her own OCD ( Shahriar Ghoudsifar ) for the first time. Will she get through it with the help of her American Girl Doll, ’70s icon Julie Albright? Or will OCD successfully convince her that he is the one true God, all mighty and powerful? Come find out, or as OCD would say, “Your Whole Family Will Die.” Written & directed by Julia Doogan Starring Claire Wunschel & Shahriar Ghoudsifar and Mrs. Mayberry Hires a Temporary Literary Secretary UCBLA Maude and Characters Welcome alum Amanda Walgrove presents a tongue-twisting solo show inside the weird, wacky, and whimsical world of Mrs. Mary Marie Mayberry, an original character born at UCB back in 2018. Amanda’s Mrs. Mayberry short film won the Highest Commendation Laurel at the 2020 London-Worldwide Comedy Short Film Festival. Some years later, Mrs. Mayberry is still seeking an exemplary temporary literary secretary…and you might just be the perfect fit! Written & performed by Amanda Walgrove Directed by Jeremy Guskin — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. shows.title: iO Fest '26 Sunday 1-Day Pass
shows.excerpt: iO Fest 2026, Chicago's largest improv festival, returns on July 23-26! Four days packed with improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more, featuring over 130 acts from all over the world! Purchasing this 1-Day pass grants ac...
shows.description: iO Fest 2026, Chicago's largest improv festival, returns on July 23-26! Four days packed with improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more, featuring over 130 acts from all over the world! Purchasing this 1-Day pass grants access to all General Admission performances taking place over the weekend. Space is limited in every performance venue, so seating is first-come, first-served. Shows take place each day approximately from 4 PM to 1 AM. This Sunday pass for iO Fest 2026 includes admission to the following acts: Always The Goat ANARCHY: The Improvised Musical Antojitos Bl!mp Chariot Charm Scene Danimals Dean Evans: My Finest Work Deep Schwa Dough Dough Duluth Ephemera The Hail Marys Here 4 a Bit Heya Toots Houndstooth Improv: The Play Improvised Romantasy Kohl's Cash Lady Franklyn New York's Finest Series Regulars Sister Whisper Sketch Playlist War Candy ***Purchase of this 1-Day GA Pass DOES NOT grant admission to any headliner shows: 3Peat, Armando, Astronomy Club, Baby Wants Candy, Claire + Kim, Comedy Dance Chicago, ¡ESCÁNDALO!, Improvised Shakespeare Co., Jackbox Games, James Conklin Memorial Scholarship Show, Parker Callahan, SAND, The Sloppy Boys, UCB Soundtrack, and Unmuted. Tickets for those specific shows much be purchased separately.*** 1-Day passes are non-transferable and non-refundable. Purchaser must show up to our box office with an ID identical to the name under which they purchased the tickets to receive their day pass. iO Fest is an all-ages event, but due to the improvised nature of our shows, we cannot guarantee the appropriateness of each show for younger audiences. Follow iO on social media to stay up to date with all information related to iO Fest 2026. Purchase the 4-Day pass here to save money on all shows!

shows.description: This ticket admits entry to the James Conklin Memorial Scholarship Show performance on July 26 at 6:00pm ONLY. James Conklin Memorial Scholarship Show at iO Theater! DOORS: 5:30PM | SHOW: 6:00PM | ALL AGES This year, iO Theater honors one of our most impactful partnerships on the final night of iO Fest; The James Conklin Memorial Scholarship! This variety show will feature current and former JCMS recipients, some *very special guests*, and friends of James from all over the country. Half our profits from this show will go back to JCMS and help fund the next generations of scholars. Learn more about James and this non-profit founded in his honor here: https://jcscholarship.org/ _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: *FREE* ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed.…
shows.description: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed. Tickets will become available on Friday, July 24th, at 12pm ET. Come back to this page then! If you do not reserve a seat in advance, please still show up anyways and we’ll try to get you in if there are some no-shows! ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are FREE to reserve! Please note: this show will not be live streamed All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Gravid Water
shows.excerpt: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular…
shows.description: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular play. They are paired with improvisers who have no prior knowledge of the scenes—seeing and reacting to them for the first time on stage. The always surprising results are hilarious, heartbreaking, and everything in between. Gravid Water has played to sold-out houses in New York and Los Angeles for over fifteen years, as well as the Kennedy Center and theaters across the country. Starring the biggest names in comedy, Broadway, television, and movies, Gravid Water is honored to bring this wild experiment back home to the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. shows.title: CLIP SHOW: A Stand-Up Open Mic
shows.excerpt: A low-stakes open mic where comedians have the options of filming their sets and getting constructive feedback from the crowd. Come through to the UCB Annex every 4th Tuesday of the month to get some stage time in a supportive…
shows.description: A low-stakes open mic where comedians have the options of filming their sets and getting constructive feedback from the crowd. Come through to the UCB Annex every 4th Tuesday of the month to get some stage time in a supportive room, practice your routine, and get some clips to feed the ever-hungry Content Machine! This is a fun, low-stakes mic for experienced performers as well as Improv students who have been flirting with the idea of stand-up. You will have the option of doing a regular 5 minutes or to reserve some of your time for positive, constructive feedback. We’ll get as many comics up as we can so we can all create some of that sweet, sweet content for Our Lord And Savior, The Algorithm. Womxn, trans, non-binary, and LGBTQIA+ strongly encouraged. Let’s make a space that feels safe and comfortable for everyone. Hosted by Abbey Perez — This event is FREE! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. shows.title: Bits for Backpacks
shows.excerpt: Homework is optional. Helping kids isn't. Join NYC's funniest comedians for a school-themed variety show benefiting Broadway Serves' Operation Backpack campaign. School's in session—and this time, the only homework is laughing. Join some of NYC's funniest comedians for Bits…
shows.description: Homework is optional. Helping kids isn’t. Join NYC’s funniest comedians for a school-themed variety show benefiting Broadway Serves’ Operation Backpack campaign. School’s in session—and this time, the only homework is laughing. Join some of NYC’s funniest comedians for Bits for Backpacks, a one-night-only comedy variety show benefiting Broadway Serves’ Operation Backpack campaign. Inspired by this year’s theme, School Daze, performers will bring their funniest characters, PowerPoints, songs, stand-up, storytelling, clown pieces, and delightfully unhinged creations celebrating everything from kindergarten to college, theatre kids to teachers, cafeteria politics to commencement speeches. Expect a fast-paced night of original comedy, nostalgic school memories, and wonderfully ridiculous takes on education in all its forms. Best of all, every laugh helps make a difference. Instead of a traditional ticket, audience members are encouraged to bring a new backpack (or make an equivalent donation at the door) to support Operation Backpack, helping provide NYC students experiencing homelessness with the tools they need to start the school year with confidence. For what to include and other information, please review the Backpack Guidelines linked here . Whether you were the class clown, the teacher’s pet, the theatre kid, or someone who spent a little too much time in detention, there’s a seat for you in this classroom. Come laugh. Give back. Help a student start the school year strong. Link to donation page: https://donate.voa-gny.org/-/NQZTPARK?member=SNALLZDX Hosted by Lauren Brickman & Special Emcee JOHN ARTHUR HILL (Radio Andy, Broadway’s Hairspray & Boy from Oz, and so much more!) Featuring: Katy Berry & Adrian Frimpong Caitlin Bitzegaio Laura Canty-Samuel Tim Girrbach Larry Dorsay Jr Tony Harkin and Emily Tarver & Vicci Martinez with more TBA —- This is a fundraiser! Admittance: One NEW backpack or $20 donation (students pay what you can, suggested $10 donation). Payme

shows.title: Not In My Backyard!
shows.excerpt: Comedians, journalists, and politicians debate all the local issues causing drama in your neighborhood’s Facebook group. From bike lanes and outdoor dining to dog poop and rats, our panel of comedians and experts gets to the bottom of how…
shows.description: Comedians, journalists, and politicians debate all the local issues causing drama in your neighborhood’s Facebook group. From bike lanes and outdoor dining to dog poop and rats, our panel of comedians and experts gets to the bottom of how this insane and beautiful city works. We’ll also quiz the audience on their own New York knowledge. Hosted by New York City’s most informed voters, Cody Lindquist (Colbert, Broad City, PTA Executive Board) and Charlie Todd (Improv Everywhere, Pixar In Real Life, Community Board). Not In My Backyard! has featured performers from The Daily Show and Saturday Night Live, journalists from The New York Times, NY1, and MSNOW, as well as Borough Presidents, NYC Council Members, State Senators, and State Assembly Members. This Month’s Panelists: Zhubin Parang (Writer, The Daily Show) Miser (MicromobilityNYC) Carl Wilson (NYC Council Member, District 3) —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. shows.description: Two Improv Teams Fight for the Future! The World’s Most Dangerous Improv Show! In the year 2121, the World Government has outlawed LONG-FORM IMPROV. The very thing that will be the weapon for their downfall. Led by Chuck Cuckley and Fun Boy Randy, the Rebellion forces have time traveled back to UCBNY searching for the best improv team in existence! Match-Up: TBD (reigning champs) vs. Camelot (challengers) Join us every week as two comedy teams go head to head to determine who is funniest (by audience vote). Help the Rebellion find the ultimate comedy weapon. Your vote could save the world–AND OUR FUTURE!!! Hosted by Andrew Barlow & Max Bank (with special surprise guests!) shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. shows.title: The Last Word
shows.excerpt: The Last Word is the ONLY craft cocktail progression paired with a screenplay. Experience a high action comedy script complete with lights, sound, music, and other fun surprises throughout the night - including 4 cocktails crafted specifically fo...
shows.description: The Last Word is the ONLY craft cocktail progression paired with a screenplay. Experience a high action comedy script complete with lights, sound, music, and other fun surprises throughout the night - including 4 cocktails crafted specifically for each act of the show! STORY: Chartreuse is a real-life liqueur that sells millions of bottles every year, but only two people in the world know how to make it. When Mike finds one dying in the woods and is given the only known copy of the recipe, he has to decide if he can return it to the monastery that keeps it safe or die trying. DRINK PACKAGE: Select "GA + Drink Package" to have our 4 specialty cocktails brought to your table at key moments during the show. Server gratuity is included in the price. Not feeling a drink? No problem! The Last Word can be enjoyed entirely on its own. We believe the cocktails enhance the show, not make it. Select "General Admission" for a ticket without cocktails. Content Warning: Flashing lights, loud sounds, profanity, depictions of violence. Run Time: 2.5hrs including intermission The Last Friday of the month at the iO Theater thelastwordshow.com

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. Before the show, audience members may anonymously submit written confessions which the improvisers will use onstage. Now, doesn't it feel good to get that off your chest? shows.title: Improvised Survivor: Abridged
shows.excerpt: Improvised Survivor brings Chicago’s most talented improvisers as they fight for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. In this high-paced show, these castaways will compete for immunities granted by the audience and then vote each other out until...
shows.description: Improvised Survivor brings Chicago’s most talented improvisers as they fight for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. In this high-paced show, these castaways will compete for immunities granted by the audience and then vote each other out until one remains. The audience will also potentially get an opportunity to be a part of the drama by obtaining the audience idol. Each show will have a new cast, a new winner, and a new theme. Who will be the next winner of Improvised Survivor? Only you can help decide. April 18th: Improvised SurvHIGHvor: All-Stars The best of Improvised Survivor compete against the best of Improvised Survivor: Abridged, but this time … everyone is HIGH! May 15th: Improvised Survivor: Study Hall The next generation of improvisers compete for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. June 26th: Improvised Survivor: Drag Race Edition Improvisers have to lip-sync for their lives for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor.

shows.description: This Year in Music is back, and this time we are celebrating all the groovy hits of 1971 ! We’re welcoming performers from all over the city to celebrate one iconic year through singing, dancing, and radical sketch comedy. Grab your bell-bottoms and your flower crowns, and come celebrate one iconic, star-studded year with us! ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.description: Yard Sale Girls LIVE! Fresh off a spring tour and sold out slot at Netflix Is A Joke Festival, and a summer of tanning, they’re coming to you with their BEST OF hour of live sketch. Yard Sale Girls is a New York comedy group composed of Serah Bennett, Micaela Fagan, Becca Marcus, and Sam Speedy. They’re popular online and among their younger cousins. Their live shows have been featured at festivals like New York Comedy Festival, Knockouts, Sketchfest NYC, Netflix is a Joke, and more. What to expect? At least one dance number, Becca will get overwhelmed, Serah will mention at least one ex boyfriend, Micaela’s parents will be there, and Sam will talk to you after the show. Featuring: Serah Bennett, Becca Marcus, Micaela Fagan, Sam Speedy, and Keegan Garrant —- Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.title: Mystery Movie Club
shows.excerpt: Mystery Movie Club presents free screenings of curated, exciting movies from the personal collections of local movie lovers! But here's the catch - the title of the film will not be announced until you are in the room. Follow the breadcrumbs, tr...
shows.description: Mystery Movie Club presents free screenings of curated, exciting movies from the personal collections of local movie lovers! But here's the catch - the title of the film will not be announced until you are in the room. Follow the breadcrumbs, trust your gut, expand your horizons! Come enjoy the weaving narratives, the wide array of emotions, and the joy of community. Stay afterwards for a quick, low stakes, interactive chat about the film. Drinks, food, and snacks available at the bar. There is nothing like watching a movie on the big screen! That's the power of cinema, baby!

shows.title: ...& Sometimes Dragons
shows.excerpt: Deep in the Nowhere lies The Lost Tavern, a welcoming bar tucked away in a back alley of Obscurity. It is there that our heroes, dedicated cohorts of the Non-dimensional Paragon Cooperative, begin their quests. Join our valiant mercenaries as they...
shows.description: Deep in the Nowhere lies The Lost Tavern, a welcoming bar tucked away in a back alley of Obscurity. It is there that our heroes, dedicated cohorts of the Non-dimensional Paragon Cooperative, begin their quests. Join our valiant mercenaries as they set out on adventure and help to shape the story as they pursue good, gold, or glory. This real-play D&D adventure will be pursued by incredible improvisers and comedians, weaving a tale that can only happen once! You, as the audience and patrons of The Lost Tavern, can sit back and enjoy watching it unfold or take a more active hand in helping or hindering our heroes through mini games and interactive elements. Knowledge of the role playing game "Dungeons & Dragons" will enhance your experience, but is not required in order to enjoy the rich telling of a story not yet written.

shows.title: Monster of the Week
shows.excerpt: A completely improvised episode of your favorite supernatural teen drama. Monster of the Week improvises a full episode of a classic CW teen drama. Except these teens are constantly being pulled out of class to defeat whatever evil force has…
shows.description: A completely improvised episode of your favorite supernatural teen drama. Monster of the Week improvises a full episode of a classic CW teen drama. Except these teens are constantly being pulled out of class to defeat whatever evil force has just rolled into their idyllic town. Based on popular 2000s era series like Buffy the Vampire Slayer, Teen Wolf, Supernatural, and so many more, expect a nostalgic and hilarious take on the shows that taught us to be afraid of the dark. Unless there’s a hunky vampire lurking out there. By the end of every episode, our heroes will have discovered and (hopefully) defeated the baddie, but there are no guarantees against the greatest monster of all—puberty. Featuring: Aimée Lutkin, Johnny McNulty, and more TBA! —- In-person tickets are $15 plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. shows.title: CABAL
shows.excerpt: The Very Best Solo Sketch CABAL combines writer-performers from SNL, The Daily Show, The New Yorker, The Second City, and Just for Laughs into one supergroup delivering the very best in solo sketch comedy. The next big gay pop star?…
shows.description: The Very Best Solo Sketch CABAL combines writer-performers from SNL, The Daily Show, The New Yorker, The Second City, and Just for Laughs into one supergroup delivering the very best in solo sketch comedy. The next big gay pop star? The heroine of the spicy romantasy novel you’re reading? The new Barbie who’s a 6 out of 10? The guy who farts into wine to make it champagne? Any one of them might be in the CABAL. You’ve seen members of CABAL on Dropout, What We Do in the Shadows, The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel, Search Party, The Tonight Show, The Rehearsal, The Problem with Jon Stewart, Stephen Colbert’s Tooning Out the News, Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt, Girls5Eva, High Maintenance, Difficult People, and much more. Now see them live, performing a new 60-minute barrage of original characters every month. shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.description: Hail and well met, traveler! Grab a drink, put up your cloak, and I’ll tell you a tale. Escapades is a completely improvised choose-your-own adventure. Sprinkled throughout each story are opportunities for the audience to vote on what happens next. Whether we’re riding jetpacks on Mars or a unicorn through a gumdrop forest, you’re guaranteed a night of gasps, laughs, twists, turns, and daring rescues. Excelsior!

shows.title: Windy City Comedy Festival Presents: Headliners Only
shows.excerpt: No openers. No filler. Just killers. Headliners Only is Windy City Comedy Fest’s premier Saturday night showcase featuring a stacked lineup of nationally touring comedians, festival favorites, and performers who know exactly how to command a room....
shows.description: No openers. No filler. Just killers. Headliners Only is Windy City Comedy Fest’s premier Saturday night showcase featuring a stacked lineup of nationally touring comedians, festival favorites, and performers who know exactly how to command a room. These comics don’t need a warm-up—they are the event. Set inside Chicago’s legendary iO Theater, this showcase delivers high-energy stand-up, sharp writing, and the kind of performances that remind you why live comedy hits different. Whether you’re a comedy fan, comic, or just looking for the best Saturday night show of the fest, Headliners Only brings together some of the strongest acts of the weekend for one unforgettable lineup. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Aperol? Yes-and!" with your ticket. It includes Tanqueray gin, Aperol, lemon juice, and honey syrup, topped with soda water and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: The Saga of the Skeeter Stevenson Variety Hour
shows.excerpt: Skeeter Stevenson is an amateur slam poet and a professional activist who has traveled the world spreading a message of peace and love (not in a religious way). Skeeter is a passionate protester and a complicated character who, through his work, h...
shows.description: Skeeter Stevenson is an amateur slam poet and a professional activist who has traveled the world spreading a message of peace and love (not in a religious way). Skeeter is a passionate protester and a complicated character who, through his work, has changed tens of minds to date. Kevin is his best friend. The Saga of the Shining Emblem is a one-of-a-kind improvised story-telling experience. One lucky audience member will be selected to be the hero of their own epic quest and given the opportunity to have their name forever engraved upon the walls of the Hall of Heroes. Separately, these shows have changed the world. Together, they are an unstoppable force of comedy. The Saga of the Skeeter Stevenson Variety Hour is a combo show unlike any other. This show WILL change your heart and mind. Featuring special surprise guests!

shows.description: UCB comedy powerhouse, The Prophecy, does an hour of improv based on your futures. Come watch the long-running, critically-acclaimed UCB improv team, The Prophecy, do an hour of improv based on your futures. Will the trip be a disaster? Will the crush say yes? Will Liz from the office ever stop heating up salmon in the microwave for lunch? Featuring NYC’s most talented actors and comedians, The Prophecy creates a hilarious, theatrical experience that the audience and the performers will never see again. We’ve consulted the cards, the leaves, the stars- everything. You don’t wanna miss this. shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.excerpt: A sketch comedy show made in ONE day, featuring New York’s best comedy writers and performers! Once a month, we cram together New York’s best writers and performers to craft an ALL-NEW sketch comedy show from scratch IN ONE SINGLE…
shows.description: A sketch comedy show made in ONE day, featuring New York’s best comedy writers and performers! Once a month, we cram together New York’s best writers and performers to craft an ALL-NEW sketch comedy show from scratch IN ONE SINGLE DAY! We start the day at 9am with NOTHING, but a show is going up by the end of the night whether we’re ready or not! Sketch Cram is all the comedy you can cram into a single show, featuring writers and performers from some of your favorite shows, bringing you 100% NEW CONTENT EVERY MONTH! So grab a ticket, and cram your butt into a seat! It’s Sketch Cram time, baby! SKETCH CRAM IS PRODUCED, DIRECTED AND WRITTEN BY: Georgie Aldaco Inside Amy Schumer, Miracle Workers [TBS], Koala Man [Hulu] Jared Bronen (Maude Night, New York Comedy Festival, The Trash King) Alex Guaglianone (Maude Night, Just For Laughs, Nicholl Fellowship Finalist, Austin Screenplay Finalist) Stacey Kulow (Maude Night, Austin Sketch Fest, Buffy the Gilmore Slayer Podcast) Hunter Nelson (The Onion, The Truth Fiction Podcast) Rachel Taenzler (Harold Night, PAGE Awards Finalist, TikTok home cook @racheltaenzler) THIS MONTH’S GUESTS… TBA — In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. shows.title: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience
shows.excerpt: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience Finally, an improv show that will make you want to go to jury duty! “The Trial” improvises a tense courtroom trial right before your eyes -- from dramatic opening statements to thrilling verdict. The first…
shows.description: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience Finally, an improv show that will make you want to go to jury duty! “The Trial” improvises a tense courtroom trial right before your eyes — from dramatic opening statements to thrilling verdict. The first half of the show is a “Spokane” form in the courtroom; we flash back-and-forth in time from the courtroom to the events pertinent to the trial, all the while “seeing” testimony, witnesses, and evidence along the way. The second half of the show is a Monoscene taking place during deliberations as a jury decides the fate of the accused. Can you handle the truth??? Watch as a rotating cast of NYC’s best improvisers destroy the stage with their wit, wisdom and undeniable talent. Help us make this show so big, we HAVE to make t-shirts on Cafe-press. shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few.
