shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.title: Gravid Water
shows.excerpt: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular…
shows.description: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular play. They are paired with improvisers who have no prior knowledge of the scenes—seeing and reacting to them for the first time on stage. The always surprising results are hilarious, heartbreaking, and everything in between. Gravid Water has played to sold-out houses in New York and Los Angeles for over fifteen years, as well as the Kennedy Center and theaters across the country. Starring the biggest names in comedy, Broadway, television, and movies, Gravid Water is honored to bring this wild experiment back home to the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. shows.title: CONNOR RATLIFF presents THE ACTING CLASS
shows.excerpt: A one-person improv show disguised as an acting class, from the creator of the Dead Eyes podcast. Professional actor (Widow's Bay, Bob's Burgers, “King Henry” in a recent State Farm ad) and award-winning podcaster (Dead Eyes) CONNOR RATLIFF is a…
shows.description: A one-person improv show disguised as an acting class, from the creator of the Dead Eyes podcast. Professional actor (Widow’s Bay, Bob’s Burgers, “King Henry” in a recent State Farm ad) and award-winning podcaster (Dead Eyes) CONNOR RATLIFF is a classically trained performer who graduated “with honours” from the prestigious Liverpool Institute For Performing Arts over a quarter of a century ago, making his professional debut on the stage of the Royal Court Theatre in London’s West End. During that same year, he also performed at Buckingham Palace for Queen Elizabeth II. In the decades that followed, he has accumulated numerous credits as a star of stage, screen and stream, appearing in multiple Netflix Original Films as well as content on CBS, NBC, FOX, TBS, Nickelodeon, TruTV, Home Box Office, Amazon Prime, Apple TV and the now-defunct comedy platforms, Go90 and Seeso. But none of that matters now. What matters now is CONNOR RATLIFF presents THE ACTING CLASS, an unending series of workshop performances where he will, before your very eyes, demonstrate what acting truly IS. Each performance will be slightly interactive and completely improvised, with occasional opportunities for “students” to participate (from the safety of their position in the audience.) [Sometimes, there will be a guest, and occasionally they will not be announced in advance. Previous “announced” guests include Jack Quaid, Zach Cherry, Patrick Wilson, James III, Jeff Hiller and Griffin Newman; “surprise” guests have included Meg Ryan and Rachel Zegler.] Defiantly self-indulgent and beyond pointless, THE ACTING CLASS is your opportunity to witness the kind of greatness – only slightly appreciated by The Industry – that has kept Connor Ratliff steadily employed for nearly half of the past 10+ years. Praise for Connor Ratliff: “Connor Ratliff is a brilliant and funny comedic performer and actor.” THE NEW YORKER “An Improv Star.” VANITY FAIR “An Improv Ace.” MEN’S JOURNAL “Funny.” THE FINANCIAL TIMES

Eric Feurer, Michael Hartney, Sarah Smallwood Parsons, and Justin Tyler host New York’s best and brightest writer/performers with a new crop of hilarious original characters and impressions every month. shows.title: The Spice Rack Jam
shows.excerpt: Come be unapologetically [insert non-white race here] and unapologetically goofy on stage with us on the 4th Friday of each month at 7pm at the BCC Pig Pen! Free for BCC Students w/ suggested donation to Div. Scholarship!
shows.description: SIGN-UPS 6:45 PM JAM: 7:00 PM BCC Pig Pen The Spice Rack is BCC’s improv jam for BIPOC-identifying folks! Our goal is to create a fun, low-stakes space for improvisers of BIPOC experience to get silly and radiate some heckin’ joy. The jam is completely free, and no improv experience is needed. And to all allies, feel free to come and laugh! Come be unapologetically [insert non-white race here] and unapologetically goofy on stage with us on the 4th Friday of each month at 7pm at the BCC Pig Pen! (-sexy whisper- It’ll be our spicy little secret ) Free! Must be 18+ to attend FREE FOr BCC STUDENTS w/ Suggested Donation to Div. Scholarship

shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. No outside alcohol is allowed in the space. There are 35 seats - first come, first serve - and then standing room up to capacity. All ticket sales are final - no refunds. If you must miss your show, email us at info@brooklyncc.com with at least 24 hours notice and we can transfer your tickets to any upcoming show at the BCC. Answers to most other questions can be found here . If show is sold out, limited tickets will be available at the door. Lineup subject to change. Buy tickets $5 OFF TIX BEFORE DAY OF SHOW

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: *FREE* ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed.…
shows.description: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed. Tickets will become available on Friday, August 28th, at 12pm ET. Come back to this page then! If you do not reserve a seat in advance, please still show up anyways and we’ll try to get you in if there are some no-shows! ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are FREE to reserve! Please note: this show will not be live streamed All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.description: DOORS: 8:15 PM SHOW: 8:30 PM Eris Mainstage The Award-winning improv team Bad Magicians have been sent to this Earth to make humans feel again through the art that is improvisational comedy. These three trash-bag wearing weirdos combine clown, avant-garde theater and drama therapy into a dramatic soup that can only be described as “high art meets low bullshit.” Join us and be healed. shows.title: Promedy
shows.excerpt: Make up for lost time (LOSER) or relive the glory days (BURNOUT) at iO’s very own big dance: Promedy! Featuring Chicago’s hottest college teams, Promedy is a quarterly improv and comedy show by college students, for college students. Follow our mo...
shows.description: Make up for lost time (LOSER) or relive the glory days (BURNOUT) at iO’s very own big dance: Promedy! Featuring Chicago’s hottest college teams, Promedy is a quarterly improv and comedy show by college students, for college students. Follow our monthly prom theme by sticking to our very expected dress code, and maybe you’ll finally be eligible for our Prom Court (FLOP)! Of course, no prom is complete without the classics, such as: bowl of punch!
